title: Dumbledore's Army, Reborn
prose: It starts the way it always does — a coin passed hand to hand, a message about where and when — except this time it isn't extra Defence practice, it's Neville Longbottom, Ginny Weasley, and Luna Lovegood keeping Dumbledore's Army alive as something closer to outright resistance: hiding students the Carrows want to punish, scrawling messages on corridor walls, holding the line in small, stubborn ways.
You're not the one leading it. You're one of a dozen or more who show up anyway, because the alternative — doing nothing while the Carrows run the school — has stopped feeling like an option.

choices.label: Keep showing up, whatever it costs.
